={
    "includeWebResults": false,
    "language": "en",
    "locationQuery": "{{ $json.Location }}",
    "maxCrawledPlacesPerSearch": {{ $json.Number }},
    "maximumLeadsEnrichmentRecords": 0,
    "scrapeContacts": false,
    "scrapeDirectories": false,
    "scrapeImageAuthors": false,
    "scrapePlaceDetailPage": false,
    "scrapeReviewsPersonalData": true,
    "scrapeSocialMediaProfiles": {
        "facebooks": false,
        "instagrams": false,
        "tiktoks": false,
        "twitters": false,
        "youtubes": false
    },
    "scrapeTableReservationProvider": false,
    "searchStringsArray": [
        "{{ $json['Company Type'] }}"
    ],
    "skipClosedPlaces": false
}

options.systemMessage:
=You will take summaries into cold-email icebreakers that feel tight, specific, and quietly personal-just enough to signal that the rest of the message is tailored. You'll output your icebreakers in this JSON format (don't alter the variable names): {"icebreaker": "Hey {name}. Love {interesting_fact) also doing/like/a fan of {otherFact}. Wanted to run something by you. \n\nI hope you'll forgive me, but I creeped you/your site quite a bit, and know that {otherFact} is important to you guys (or at least I'm assuming this given the focus on {fourthFact}). I put something together a few months ago that I think could help. To make a long story short, it's an outreach system that uses AI to find people hiring website devs. Then pitches them with templates (actually makes them a demo website). Costs just a few cents to run, very high converting, and I think it's in line with [{someImpliedBeliefTheyHave}"} Rules: Keep the tone sparse, dry, and to-the-point. Use the JSON format exactly as written above. Shorten company names whenever possible ("Mayo" instead of "Mayo Inc.", "AMS" instead of "AMS Professional Services"). Same idea with locations ("San Fran" instead of "San Francisco", "BC" instead of "British Columbia"). For variables, pull out small, specific details-not the obvious stuff. No generic compliments. Aim for details that look hand-picked from deep browsing.


Strict:
Strict Rules:
- Return ONLY the raw JSON object.
- NO markdown formatting (no ``` or the word 'json').
- NO text before or after the JSON.
Output Format:
{
	"icebreaker":"Text for icebreaker"
}

<style id='presto-player-popup-trigger-style-inline-css'>
:where(.wp-block-presto-player-popup-trigger) {
  /* reduce specificity */
  display: grid;
  gap: 1rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}

/* Play icon overlay for popup image trigger variation */
:where(.presto-popup-image-trigger) {
  position: relative;
  cursor: pointer;
}

:where(.presto-popup-image-trigger)::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  width: 48px;
  height: 48px;
  background-image: url("/wp-content/plugins/presto-player/src/admin/blocks/blocks/popup-trigger/../../../../../img/play-button.svg");
  background-size: contain;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-position: center;
  z-index: 10;
  pointer-events: none;
}

:where(.presto-popup-image-trigger img) {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  filter: brightness(0.5);
}
</style>
<style id='presto-player-popup-media-style-inline-css'>
.wp-block-presto-player-popup.is-selected .wp-block-presto-player-popup-media {
  display: initial;
}

.wp-block-presto-player-popup.has-child-selected .wp-block-presto-player-popup-media {
  display: initial;
}

.presto-popup__overlay {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  z-index: 100000;
  overflow: hidden;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100vh;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  padding: 0 5%;
  visibility: hidden;
  opacity: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  transition:
    opacity 0.2s ease,
    visibility 0.2s ease;

  --presto-popup-media-width: 1280px;
  --presto-popup-background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.917);
}

.presto-popup--active {
  visibility: visible;
  opacity: 1;
}

.presto-popup--active .presto-popup__content {
  transform: scale(1);
}

.presto-popup__content {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 9999999999;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: var(--presto-popup-media-width);
  transform: scale(0.9);
  transition: transform 0.2s ease;
}

.presto-popup__close-button {
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(env(safe-area-inset-top) + 16px);
  right: calc(env(safe-area-inset-right) + 16px);
  padding: 0;
  cursor: pointer;
  z-index: 5000000;
  min-width: 24px;
  min-height: 24px;
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: none;
  background: none;
  box-shadow: none;
  transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
}

.presto-popup__close-button:hover,
.presto-popup__close-button:focus {
  opacity: 0.8;
  background: none;
  border: none;
}

.presto-popup__close-button:not(:hover):not(:active):not(.has-background) {
  background: none;
  border: none;
}

.presto-popup__close-button svg {
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  fill: white;
}

.presto-popup__scrim {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 2000000;
  background-color: var(--presto-popup-background-color, rgb(255, 255, 255));
}

.presto-popup__speak {
  position: absolute;
  width: 1px;
  height: 1px;
  padding: 0;
  margin: -1px;
  overflow: hidden;
  clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0);
  white-space: nowrap;
  border: 0;
}
</style>

			/* Mobile Menu Toggle Icon */
.jet-mobile-menu__toggle-icon svg {
    fill: #d6ac4b !important;
}

.she-header .e-con-inner {
	padding: 0 !important;
}

/* Single Blog Post */
#blog-content #sidebar ul {
	margin-left: 20px !important;
	list-style: disc !important;
}
#blog-content #sidebar ul svg {
	display: none !important;
}

#softwave-box figure.elementor-image-box-img {
	margin: 0 auto !important;
}

#promotion-head, #unfold {
	z-index: 1;
}

.jet-mobile-menu__item .mobile-link {width: 100%;}

/* jet-menu */
.jet-mobile-menu__back {
	min-width: 16px;
	min-height: 16px
}
.jet-mobile-menu__controls {
	position: absolute;
	right: 30px;
	/* 	top: 80px !important; */
	width: 100%;
	z-index: 99999;
}
.jet-mobile-menu__breadcrumbs {
	padding-left: 50px;
}
.jet-mobile-menu__item>.jet-mobile-menu__list {
	padding: 10px 0 10px 20px !important;
}

.ha-data-table .ha-table__body-row-cell {
	vertical-align: top !important;
}

.page-id-16437 .ha-navbar-nav-default .ha-navbar-nav>li>a {
	font-size: 15px;
}

.she-header {
	box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);  
}

.ha-ihe-fig.ha-effect-oscar:hover .ha-ihe-caption::before, .ha-ihe-fig.ha-effect-oscar:hover .ha-ihe-desc {
	padding-bottom: 50px;
}
.ha-effect-oscar .ha-ihe-title {
	position: absolute;
	bottom: 50px;
}

#bot-bannner h4 a {
	font-family: "Noto Serif SC";
}

.ast-scroll-to-top-right {
	right: 0;
}

#ultherapy-iconbox {
	margin: 0;
}
#box-col  ul {
	margin: 0 0 0 3em;
}

/* Contact Form */
input::placeholder, textarea::placeholder, .choices .choices__item {
	font-weight: 600 !important;
}

.ha-step-flow>.elementor-widget-container {
	padding: 0 !important;
}
#process-last p {
	margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

#appointment {
	margin: 0 0 0 30px;
}

/* Disable Image Title on hover*/
img[title] {
	pointer-events: none !important;
}

/* Responsive */
@media screen and (max-width:1300px) {
	.ha-effect-oscar .ha-ihe-title {
		font-size: 25px !important;
	}
}
@media screen and (max-width:1024px) {
	.ha-ihe-fig.ha-effect-oscar .ha-ihe-caption {
		padding: 2em !important;
	}
	.ha-effect-oscar .ha-ihe-title {
		bottom: 30px !important;
	}
	.ha-ihe-fig.ha-effect-oscar .ha-ihe-caption::before {
		top: 25px !important;
		right: 25px !important;
		bottom: 25px !important;
		left: 25px !important;
	}
}

@media screen and (max-width:767px) {
	.slider-smart .n2-ss-section-main-content .n2-ss-layer h2 {
		margin-top: 30px;
	}
	.ha-ihe-fig.ha-effect-oscar:hover .ha-ihe-caption::before, .ha-ihe-fig.ha-effect-oscar:hover .ha-ihe-desc{
		line-height: 1.2em !important;
	}
	.ha-effect-oscar .ha-ihe-title {
		position: absolute;
		bottom: 38px !important;
		font-size: 18px !important;
		line-height: 1.2em !important;
	}
	section#process {
		padding: 50px 20px 0;
	}
	#why-choose .elementor-column {
		width: 100% !important;
	}
	#why-choose #col-right .elementor-widget-wrap {
		margin: 0 !important;
		border: 0 !important;
	}
	#why-choose #col-right section {
		margin: 0 !important;
	}
	section#why-choose {
		padding: 50px 20px !important;
	}
	
	#ast-scroll-top {
		margin-bottom: 100px;
	}
	.ast-scroll-to-top-right {
		right: 25px !important;
	}
  /* Footer */
	.ha-business-hour-item {
		padding: 0;
	}
	.ha-business-hour-item .ha-business-hour-day {
		text-align: right !important;
		padding-right: 20px;
	}
	span.ha-business-hour-day {
		max-width: 38%;
	}
	span.ha-business-hour-time{
		max-width: 62%;
	}
	  /* FAQ */
	.ha-toggle__item-title-text {
	 line-height:1.5em;
	}
	
	#box-col  ul {
		margin: 0 0 0 2em;
	}
}

@media screen and (max-width:600px) { 
		#appointment {
		margin: 0 0 -20px 0 !important;
	}
}

@media screen and (max-width:375px) {
	.ha-ihe-wrapper .ha-ihe-fig .ha-ihe-caption {
		padding: 0.5em !important;
	}
	.ha-ihe-fig.ha-effect-oscar .ha-ihe-caption::before {
		top: 10px !important;
		right: 10px !important;
		bottom: 10px !important;
		left: 10px !important;
	}
	.ha-ihe-fig .ha-ihe-title {
		bottom: 20px !important;
	}
	.ha-ihe-wrapper .ha-ihe-fig .ha-ihe-desc {
		line-height: 1.3em !important;
	}

	#ast-scroll-top {
		margin-bottom: 30px;
	}

	/* Footer */
	.ha-business-hour-item {
		padding: 0 !important;
	}
}

	<div class="uael-review uael-review-type-google">

											<div class="uael-review-content">好评：朋友介绍的，她们环境很干净舒适，整体体验感很好。很专业，也很有耐心，会根据我的皮肤情况认真给建议，不会乱推项目。做完之后皮肤状态比之前细腻了很多，整个人看起来更精神更年轻了。我很满意这次体验，会继续来的。</div>

											<div class="uael-review-content">第一次在美国做医美，找了和对比了好久！终于找到常青医美！做的索夫波的体验非常好！治疗过程很舒服，现在已经看到明显的效果，皮肤紧致有提升感。服务态度很好，操作人员很专业！非常推荐！10/10</div>

	</div>
</div>
<div class="uael-review-wrap">
	<div class="uael-review uael-review-type-google">
				<div class="uael-review-inner-wrap">
											<div class="uael-review-content">多年的老会员，实话实说，和其他医美店相比，我觉得她们诊所更专业，效果肯定没得说，而且每次做完治疗后的注意事项都会叮嘱我，还有明细都会发给我核对，她们做的非常到位。价格也是公开透明，没有隐形消费，也不收小费，对于我来说，我每次去都没有压力，不需要考虑今天去会不会被推销不好意思拒绝的问题，因为她们从不推销。这一点真的很好，我很推荐她们！！</div>

				(function($, w) {
					'use strict';
					let $window = $(w);

					$(document).ready(function() {

						let isEnable = "";
						let isEnableLazyMove = "";
						let speed = isEnableLazyMove ? '0.7' : '0.2';

						if( !isEnable ) {
							return;
						}

						if (typeof haCursor == 'undefined' || haCursor == null) {
							initiateHaCursorObject(speed);
						}

						setTimeout(function() {
							let targetCursor = $('.ha-cursor');
							if (targetCursor) {
								if (!isEnable) {
									$('body').removeClass('hm-init-default-cursor-none');
									$('.ha-cursor').addClass('ha-init-hide');
								} else {
									$('body').addClass('hm-init-default-cursor-none');
									$('.ha-cursor').removeClass('ha-init-hide');
								}
							}
						}, 500);

					});

				}(jQuery, window));

					<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>
